headline: Gilead Sciences and Lakefront Complete Acquisition of Ouro Medicines to Further Expand Inflammation Pipeline
summary: FOSTER CITY, Calif. & MECHELEN, Belgium, June 04, 2026--Gilead Sciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: GILD) and Lakefront Biotherapeutics NV (Euronext & Nasdaq: LKFT) today announced the successful completion of the previously announced acquisition of Ouro Medicines to advance T cell engager therapies for autoimmune diseases.

headline: Top Tech Companies To Watch In 2026
summary: Technology leadership in 2026 is expanding beyond a single AI trade, with innovation accelerating across biotechnology, gaming, space infrastructure, robotics and semiconductors.
